title: Request for Quotation
description: One RFQ: the items sent to suppliers and the quotes coming back.

steps.title: RFQ items
steps.description: The materials and quantities you asked suppliers to price.
steps.voiceScript: This RFQ lists the items and quantities you sent out for pricing.
steps.captionText: This RFQ lists the items and quantities you sent out for pricing.
steps.fallbackMessage: RFQ items: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Supplier responses
steps.voiceScript: Supplier responses appear here so you can compare quotes side by side.
steps.captionText: Supplier responses appear here so you can compare quotes side by side.
steps.fallbackMessage: Supplier responses: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Award or add to BOQ
steps.description: Turn the best quote into a purchase.
steps.voiceScript: Take the best quote onto your bill of quantities or procurement list.
steps.captionText: Take the best quote onto your bill of quantities or procurement list.
steps.fallbackMessage: Award or add to BOQ: not visible on this screen yet.
